definitions.text: Prior; occurring before something else, either in time or order.
examples: He is no better than the previous Prime Minister.

definitions.text: Premature; acting or occurring too soon.
An existing criminal record (short for "previous convictions")
examples: It turned out the shoplifter had a lot of previous.

definitions.text: A track record of similar behaviour, especially bad behaviour.
A record of previous hostility or conflict (between people).
examples: The two players refused to shake hands — there's a bit of previous there.
